weekly_goals.goal: Understand the fundamental concepts of entertainment and intellectual property law, including the protection of creative works and the regulation of entertainment industries.
Learn about copyright law and its application to entertainment content, including music, film, and television.
Explore trademark law and its relevance to the entertainment industry, including brand protection and licensing.
Understand the regulation of entertainment industries, including film, television, and music production.
Analyze the intersection of entertainment law and intellectual property law with business and entrepreneurship.
Examine the role of contracts in entertainment law, including talent agreements and production contracts.
Investigate the impact of international law on entertainment and intellectual property.
Discuss the ethics and social responsibility in entertainment law and intellectual property.
topics: Case Studies in Ethics and Social Responsibility

weekly_goals.goal: Explore emerging trends and issues in entertainment law and intellectual property, including technology and innovation.
topics: Future of Entertainment and IP Law

weekly_goals.goal: Apply knowledge of entertainment law and intellectual property to real-world scenarios and case studies.
